conservative.name: Feral Fire
conservative.requirements:
5 Power
Target within close range. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: A rat shaped flame leaps from your land, scurries across the battlefield, and climbs its way up the target's leg and under his armor. The target suffers 1 wound each time you remove a recharge token from this spell
As above, but you may add 2 additional recharge tokens to this card

chaosStar.description: When the last recharge token is removed, the fiery animal explodes, dealing Intelligence +2 damage to everything within close range

reckless.name: Feral Fire
reckless.requirements:
5 Power
Targets within close range. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: A rat shaped flame leaps from your land, scurries across the battlefield, and climbs its way up the target's leg and under his armor. The target suffers 1 wound each time you remove a recharge token from this spell
As above, but there are 2 rats that can effect separate targets or both attack a single target

chaosStar.description: Each time you remove a recharge token from this card, suffer 1 fatigue as one of your own rats menaces you
